title: Korak 12

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should create a while loop that checks whether current_node.next is not None.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => runPython(`
_cond = _Node(_code).find_class("LinkedList").find_function("add").find_ifs()[0].find_bodies()[1].find_whiles()[0].find_conditions()[0]
assert _cond.is_equivalent("current_node.next is not None")
`) })

tests.text: You should assign current_node.next to current_node inside the while loop.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => runPython(`
_cond = _Node(_code).find_class("LinkedList").find_function("add").find_ifs()[0].find_bodies()[1].find_whiles()[0]
assert _cond.is_equivalent("while current_node.next is not None:\\n current_node = current_node.next")
`) })

description:
I dalje unutar bloka else, kreiraj petlju while koja proverava da li current_node.next nije None.

Unutar petlje while, dodeli current_node.next na current_node.
